horizon.action_on_failure: stop staking; revert to projection and entertainment tool; do not re-gate the same sample under a new threshold

relaxation_policy: Thresholds and horizon are fixed once the first pair resolves. Any change invalidates the accumulated sample: it requires a new precommitment_id and a fresh sample counted from zero. The recorded protocol_sha256 is verified at every evaluation, so editing the thresholds in accuracy_protocol.json breaks this precommitment loudly instead of moving the goalposts quietly.
notes: Thresholds are NOT restated here. They are read from the protocol at evaluation time so the two files cannot drift into disagreeing about what the bar was.
